tagline: The SFTP connector in Lakeflow Connect (Public Preview) extends Auto Loader functionality to ingest files from SFTP servers.
what_it_does: The SFTP connector in Lakeflow Connect (Public Preview) extends Auto Loader functionality to ingest files from SFTP servers. Learn how to ingest files from SFTP servers using Lakeflow Connect. The SFTP connector extends Auto Loader functionality to provide secure, incremental ingestion from SFTP servers with Unity Catalog governance.
why_it_matters: The SFTP connector extends Auto Loader functionality to provide secure, incremental ingestion from SFTP servers with Unity Catalog governance.

capabilities.title: Standard Access Mode: USE CONNECTION
capabilities.desc: Standard Access Mode: USE CONNECTION. Compute that uses Databricks Runtime version 17.3 or above. For FedRAMP, Canada Protected…

key_takeaway: The SFTP connector in Lakeflow Connect (Public Preview) extends Auto Loader functionality to ingest files from SFTP servers.
